description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing bundler with `gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc` and then executes `bundle install` before each job. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a `rspec` job that runs `bundle exec rspec`, and a `rubocop` job that runs `bundle exec rubocop`. Use the default Ruby Docker image, no caches, artifacts, or special rules, and run on all branches.
